blocks.text: Match preview: England Women face Australia Women in Final (T20) on Sun, 5 Jul, 2026, 8:00 pm at Lord's London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Overcast · High 28°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 16 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
